Package org.eventb.core.seqprover.transformer.tests

Class LanguageFilterTest

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.core.seqprover.transformer.tests.AbstractTransformerTests
org.eventb.core.seqprover.transformer.tests.LanguageFilterTest
public class LanguageFilterTest extends AbstractTransformerTests
Acceptance tests for class LanguageFilter. Tests are only performed on goal, making the assumption that the implementation does not process it specially.
